semantic_description: Binary search lower_bound over a sorted integer array. The function preserves the input array and returns an index in [0,n] such that all elements before the index are strictly below target and every element from the index to n-1 is at least target. The loop maintains a shrinking [left,right] search interval with possible empty-loop behavior when n is 0 or left is already not below right; it does not modify memory.
